name: 2-Player Swapper
description: Control 2P mode from the pause screen and split the screen to play alone or with a mouse.

reset-on-death.name: Reset on Death
reset-on-death.description: Return to the original state of the level if you die.

split-controls.name: Split Controls
split-controls.description: Divide the screen/mouse into two: Left Half (P1) and Right Half (P2).

invert-split.name: Reverse Sides
invert-split.description: Change the order: Right (P1) and Left (P2). Requires 'Split Controls' to be active..
